top_signals.title: Samsung Earnings Send Chip Stocks Tumbling as Kospi Triggers Circuit Breaker | The Pulse 7/7/2026
top_signals.summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Jim Reid, Deutsche Bank Research Institute Head and Global Head of Macro and Thematic Research; Marta Prochwicz, European Council on Foreign Relations Deputy Head of the Warsaw office; Pierroberto Folgiero, Fincantieri CEO    (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Autodoc Is Raising €530 Million Loan to Buy Out Apollo’s Stake
top_signals.summary: German online car-parts retailer Autodoc Holding SE is raising €530 million ($606 million) in debt financing to help it buy back a minority stake held by Apollo Global Management Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: AscendTMS expands fraud-fighting toolkit with SearchCarriers integration
top_signals.summary:
InMotion Global has integrated SearchCarriers into AscendTMS’ free CVQ platform, giving brokers and shippers another tool to combat freight fraud.

The post AscendTMS expands fraud-fighting toolkit with SearchCarriers integration appeared first on FreightWaves.

top_signals.title: US Premarket Movers for July 7, 2026
top_signals.summary: S&P 500 Index futures slip 0.2% as of 7:41 a.m. in New York. Volatility hit chipmakers after Samsung Electronics Co.’s blowout earnings left investors wanting more.
